ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), OR( AND(PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Discovery", NOT(Discovery_Sign_Off_Complete__c)), AND(PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Requirement Gathering", NOT(Req_Gathering_Sign_Off_Complete__c)), AND(PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Requirement Documentation", NOT(Req_Documentation_Sign_Off_Complete__c)), AND(PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "User Story Finalization", NOT(User_Story_Sign_Off_Complete__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please complete and approve the sign-off document for the current stage before advancing.
